description: Perfect for casual wear, this floater from id is the best gift you can offer your feet. Upper Made with genuine leather for durability Fabric straps for durability and easy maintenance Cloth lining for a snug, comfortable Fit on the foot Velcro closures for a snug, customised fit Brand badge appliqued on the strap Midsole EVA midsole for lightweight feel and shock absorption Outsole Durable rubber outsole for absolute grip Care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
